lanes.name: VIP Guest Concierge
lanes.description: Private scheduled matchday planning with Black 2026 Chevrolet Tahoe eligibility for approved bookings.
lanes.boundary: Tahoe and operator assignment require review, quote, payment/deposit approval, and availability confirmation.

lanes.name: Team Family Support
lanes.description: Representative-friendly support for privacy-sensitive family, team-adjacent, or federation-linked planning.
lanes.boundary: No official team relationship, access, or credential validation is claimed.

lanes.name: Media / Corporate
lanes.description: Coordinator-led support for media crews, sponsors, executives, groups, equipment, catering, and recurring schedules.
lanes.boundary: Fleet, provider, invoice, and assignment availability require operator review.

lanes.name: Team Fan Hubs
lanes.description: Team, language, route, food, Fan Experience, shared ride, sightseeing, and activated planning support.
lanes.boundary: Shared ride matching and fulfillment are operator-confirmed and not guaranteed automatically.
